name: Codebase Bible
description: A RAG-based engine that ingests GitHub repositories, analyzes them with AI agents, and produces an interactive onboarding guide for new developers.

methods.name: Ingest Repository
methods.description: Validates a GitHub URL, marks the repository as 'processing', and returns immediately. A background task fetches the file tree, filters boilerplate, persists files, and runs chunk + embed for every file before flipping the repo status to 'completed'.

methods.name: Generate Bible
methods.description: Validates that a repository is fully ingested, marks docsStatus as 'generating', and returns immediately. A background task runs the Mapper agent (architecture summary + Mermaid flowchart) and the Deep-Dive agent (per-file technical writeups) via mindstudio.generateText, persists the results into generated_docs, and flips docsStatus to 'completed'.

methods.name: List Repositories
methods.description: Returns all repositories in the system with summary stats (file count, has overview, documented file count, status, docsStatus). Sorted newest-first.

methods.name: Get Repository Detail
methods.description: Returns one repository's metadata, all its files, and the latest repo_overview + per-file file_deepdive docs. Single round trip for the Dashboard view.

methods.name: Open Documentation PR
methods.description: Publishes the latest generated documentation as a pull request on the source GitHub repository. Creates a docs/ directory containing ARCHITECTURE.md plus per-file .bible.md writeups, commits to a fresh branch, and opens a PR against the default branch. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN with contents:write and pull_requests:write.
